WARNING: These fault patterns are for A3113 (820-03286) ONLY. Component designators are board-specific. Based on A2681 known fault patterns adapted for M3 topology.
description: Known fault patterns adapted from A2681 diagnostic data for M3 MacBook Air topology. Component-specific data will be populated as repair data becomes available.

faults.name: Port Controller (UF400/UF500) failure

symptoms.dcps_20v: 0.001A or normal (if only one port affected)

faults.fix: Replace port controller (UF400 or UF500). Check DF400/DF500 fuses.
faults.a3113_notes: A3113 port controllers feed PP3V3_UPCO_LDO and PP1V5_UPCO_LDO_CORE internally. Check CF408/CF417 support caps.

faults.name: PP3V8_AON short (VDDMAIN branch)
faults.fix: Diode mode on PP3V8_AON distribution. Thermal cam to find hot component. Check VDDMAIN and WLBT branches.
faults.a3113_notes: U5700 is same 30A SVR AON design. APN 351002645. Current sense via U5910 (MAX41033ANT+) and U5950.

faults.name: PPBUS_AON short
root_causes: Liquid damage on main bus trace
faults.fix: Diode mode on PPBUS_AON. Find shorted cap. Remove and retest.

faults.name: PP3V3_S2 / PP3V3_S2_LDO short
root_causes: Port controller internal LDO short pulling PP3V3_UPC down
faults.fix: Diode mode on PP3V3_S2 line. Check UC710 output caps (CC715-CC718).
faults.a3113_notes: UC710 on A3113 produces PP3V3_S2, PP3V3_SW_LCD, and PP3V3_S2_DEBUG. Check QC700 MOSFET for EDP panel discharge.

faults.name: U8100 (MPMU) failure
root_causes: Liquid damage on MPMU BGA pads
faults.fix: If multiple LDO outputs missing -> replace U8100 (OMIT_TABLE 998-23524). If single output missing -> find downstream short.
faults.a3113_notes: A3113 MPMU has NC LDOs: 1, 3, 5, 14, 16. Do not expect output on these. LDO 2 produces PP3V_AON (was LDO 5 on A2681). LDO 20 produces PP1V2_S2_CIO.

faults.name: SSD / NAND power fault
root_causes: SSD power IC short (UN000/UN100 area, pages 77-78)
faults.fix: Check NAND power rails from SPMU BUCK 6 and BUCK 12 SW6/7. Check fuses.
faults.a3113_notes: A3113 uses S5E MK2 NAND design with UN000/UN100 power ICs. PCIe AC coupling caps are critical (CN000-CN046 area).

faults.name: PP5V_S2 (UC300) path fault
root_causes: UC637/UC630 logic gate failure in enable chain
faults.fix: Check P5VS2_PWR_EN signal chain: PMU_CRASH_L -> UC637 (inverter) -> UC630 (AND) -> P5VS2_PWR_EN. If enable OK -> UC300 dead.
faults.a3113_notes: A3113 has a more complex P5VS2_PWR_EN gating chain than A2681. UC637 inverts PMU_CRASH, UC630 ANDs with P5VS2TIPS_PWR_EN.

faults.name: Liquid damage - multiple component failure
faults.fix: Clean board thoroughly (IPA + ultrasonic). Identify all shorts. Fix one at a time. Multiple component replacement often needed.
faults.a3113_notes: Common liquid damage areas on Air: keyboard connector area, USB-C connector area, MagSafe area. 6x TAWANG audio amplifiers are a large area to check.

faults.name: MagSafe ACE3 (U5900) failure

symptoms.magsafe: No charging via MagSafe, MagSafe LED off

faults.fix: Check F5600 fuse first (page 34). If blown, check for downstream short before replacing. If fuse OK, check U5900 ACE3 power and SPI ROM.
faults.a3113_notes: A3113 uses ACE3 (338S01614) instead of AAROXA9PA0830 from A2681. ACE3 has extensive GPIO and internal LDOs. Multiple unused GPIOs terminated with 100R to GND (R5670-R5683).

faults.name: MACAW retimer (UF600/UF650) failure

symptoms.dcps_20v: Normal current but USB-C data/display not working on affected port

root_causes: Power sequencing fault (3.3V must be HIGH before VIN_LV of Aces, page 72)
faults.fix: Check MACAW power rails. Check UF790 sequencer output (page 72). Verify 3.3V present before 1.2V/1.8V.
faults.a3113_notes: A3113 replaces separate re-timer + repeater from A2681 with combined MACAW ICs (UF600 CYG40442, UF650 CYG1A1142). UF790 (SLG04V00111) handles power sequencing with specific timing: VDDIO 0ms, VDD_FIXED 2.2ms, VDD_CIO 3.3ms, RESET deassert 11ms.
